plans.thesis: Bull's strongest point stands: the crowd has already capitulated (flow very_negative on FORCED-seller tone, items bd-9/bd-14), narrative fear is stale, influencer attention faded to apathy - exhausted sellers, the contrarian long. Bear's flat fails because two sources converge on despair, so dispersion is low and the extreme is clean, not conflicted.
plans.falsifiable_prediction: Flow mood reverts from capitulation toward neutral within 2 cycles; invalidated if forum/influencer despair tone DEEPENS (fresh forced-seller posts) instead of fading.

plans.thesis: Euphoria-top short: all three experts read terminal greed (influencer FOMO items tw-21/tw-30, recycled narrative rd-12, flow greedy on late chasers). The crowd is the marginal buyer and there is none left. Bull's momentum read IS the crowdedness; Bear won on the merits.
plans.falsifiable_prediction: Influencer euphoria tone rolls over to neutral within 2 cycles; invalidated if fresh, broad-based bullish conviction (new sources, not the same KOLs) enters the narrative.

plans.thesis: Experts genuinely conflict - flow fearful, influencer mildly greedy, narrative neutral - so dispersion is high and no mood signal dominates. Neither a clean despair to fade long nor a clean euphoria to fade short. Earned stand-down, not a deferred trigger.
plans.falsifiable_prediction: The expert dispersion persists (no two of three converge) over the next cycle; invalidated if flow and influencer both shift to the same extreme.

proposals.rationale: long the exhausted-seller capitulation; entry at price-card mark, stop ~2x ATR below to survive residual flush noise, TP1 at 2R (3600 gain vs 1800 risk). press pacing, confluent two-source extreme -> full risk_mult.
proposals.falsifiable_prediction: Flow mood reverts toward neutral within 2 cycles; invalidated if despair tone deepens.

proposals.rationale: short the terminal-euphoria crowd; entry at price-card mark, stop ~2x ATR above the exhausted-greed level, TP1 at 2R (12 gain vs 6 risk). counter-mood not yet rolled over -> confirmation true, risk_mult reduced.
proposals.falsifiable_prediction: Influencer euphoria rolls over to neutral within 2 cycles; invalidated if fresh broad conviction enters.

management.reason: capitulation thesis half played out - bank half at the mood-reversion, trail the runner.

triggers.reason: euphoria not yet rolled over - arm the short on confirmation of attention fading.

crowd_mood.rationale: Forced-seller despair dominates flow + forums across the desk; experts largely agree (low dispersion) -> a clean, fadeable extreme.
